name: deliver
description: DELIVER — the value-flow software production system. A cohesive plugin that carries value from IDEA to PRODUCTION across disciplined value-stations staffed by role-tuned agents, governed by three pillars (knowledge parity, quality-first with a performance-delta gate, waste elimination — muda·mura·muri) and an overarching token-efficiency constraint. Emits markdown as its value artefact; uses the secure (SECURITY) and publish (PUBLISHING) companion plugins automatically when they are installed, and degrades cleanly when they are not. Read VALUE_FLOW.md for the system; knowledge/ for canonical facts.

metadata.note: agents/, skills/, commands/, and hooks/hooks.json are auto-discovered from the plugin root. The conceptual map is in VALUE_FLOW.md §10; migration provenance is in docs/MIGRATION.md.
